description: Legal document in Judaeo-Arabic. The parties are Sitt al-Dār and Maymūn. The nature of the agreement is not clear. The date is [4]9[..] = 12th or early 13th century. The last two digits may be legible. Based on the use of anno mundi dating, the location may be somewhere outside of Fustat.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית בין סת אל-דאר ומימון, תאריך [4]9[..] (המאה ה-12 או תחילת ה-13), כנראה ממחוץ לפוסטאט
